understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by activating every goal cell in each level. A goal cell is completed when the player's carried piece matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation simultaneously, and the player steps onto the goal cell.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player navigates a grid-based world with walls and special tiles. Each turn, the player moves in one of four cardinal directions, costing stamina. The player's piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). Modifier tiles on the grid alter these attributes: stepping on a shape modifier cycles the piece's shape, a color modifier cycles the color, and a rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells display required shape, color, and rotation; they only activate when the piece's attributes exactly match. The player must plan a route to collect the right modifiers before reaching the goal. Stamina is limited; losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game in failure.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by activating every goal cell in each level. A goal cell is completed when the player's carried piece matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation simultaneously, and the player steps onto the goal cell.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player navigates a grid-based world with walls and special tiles. Each turn, the player moves in one of four cardinal directions, costing stamina. The player's piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). Modifier tiles on the grid alter these attributes: stepping on a shape modifier cycles the piece's shape, a color modifier cycles the color, and a rotation modifier rotates the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells display required shape, color, and rotation; they only activate when the piece's attributes exactly match. The player must plan a route to collect the right modifiers before reaching the goal. Stamina is limited; losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game in failure.
